name: GeneratePPT
tagline: Generate a clean, design-forward slide deck from notes, PDFs, URLs, or YouTube videos in under 60 seconds.
description:
GeneratePPT creates polished presentations from almost any input: notes, PDF files, DOCX documents, URLs, or YouTube video transcripts. The AI builds the slides, sources images automatically, and lets you refine everything through an AI Director editor  - all without touching a design tool. Decks export as PPTX or PDF with no watermark on paid plans.

It takes an anti-bloat approach: one simple plan with unlimited generation and exports. GeneratePPT runs an affiliate program offering 40% lifetime commission on all referred payments, upgrading to 50% after earning $10k  - one of the strongest affiliate structures among AI writing tools.

affiliateProgram.notes: Elite Partner tier at 50% commission after $10k earned. No paid ad traffic allowed.

features: Accepts notes, PDFs, DOCX, URLs, and YouTube video transcripts
pros: 40% lifetime affiliate commission (upgrades to 50% for top affiliates)
Accepts diverse inputs including YouTube video transcripts
Simple unlimited pricing  - no confusing credit limits
cons: Free tier is only 3 total decks, not recurring
High $500 minimum payout for affiliate earnings
No mid-tier plan between free and paid
